category_sources: Official SourceForge project page describes Iperf 2 as measuring network capacity, latency, responsiveness, and throughput over TCP and UDP sockets.
source_facts.description says it measures maximum TCP and UDP bandwidth.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project page title uses Iperf 2.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge project page links the man page and comparison page as documentation.
Official man page documents iperf syntax, description, and options.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge project exposes a Code tab for the iperf2 source repository.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge page and man page describe network performance metrics including throughput, latency, and responsiveness.
source_facts.description identifies TCP and UDP bandwidth measurement.
